imprintPage.title: Imprint
imprintPage.body: Legal information and company details in accordance with German Telemedia Act (TMG).
imprintPage.address: Rr. Qemal Stafa P.17 AP.1, AL-1005 Tirana, Albania
imprintPage.liabilityContentBody: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own website content in accordance with applicable German law. We are not obligated to monitor third-party information or investigate potential illegal activity unless we become aware of a specific legal violation. If such a violation is identified, the content will be removed immediately.
imprintPage.liabilityLinksBody: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We have no control over the content of these websites and therefore cannot accept responsibility for their content. If we become aware of any legal violations on linked websites, the relevant links will be removed promptly.
imprintPage.copyrightBody: All content, text, images, and materials published on this website are protected by German copyright law. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use without prior written permission is prohibited. If you believe any content infringes copyright, please contact us so we can investigate and take appropriate action.

termsPage.title: Terms & Legal Information
packageTravelParagraphs: The travel services offered by ADA – Travel Agency Tarko may constitute a package holiday within the meaning of Directive (EU) 2015/2302 and Section 651a of the German Civil Code (BGB).
Where applicable, travellers are entitled to all rights granted under the relevant European and German legislation governing package travel.
ADA – Travel Agency Tarko bears full responsibility for the proper performance of all travel services included in the booked package.
Furthermore, the company maintains the legally required insolvency protection to safeguard customer payments and, where transport is included, to ensure repatriation in the event of insolvency.
travellerRightsList: Receive all essential information before concluding a package travel contract.
Have at least one organiser responsible for the proper performance of all booked travel services.
Access emergency contact details throughout the journey.
Transfer the package booking to another traveller under applicable conditions.
Receive refunds or compensation where required by law.
Cancel or terminate a booking under the circumstances provided by applicable legislation.
Receive assistance if difficulties arise during the trip.
termsPage.travellerRightsFooter: For complete information regarding traveller rights, please refer to Directive (EU) 2015/2302.
termsPage.cancellationNote: The effective cancellation date is the date on which the written cancellation notice is received.
insolvencyParagraphs: ADA – Travel Agency Tarko maintains insolvency protection with:
Should the company become insolvent, customers may contact the insolvency protection provider regarding reimbursement of payments or repatriation where applicable.
liabilityContentParagraphs: The content of this website has been prepared with great care. However, no guarantee can be given for the completeness, accuracy, or timeliness of the information provided.
As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content in accordance with applicable law. Any liability beyond the statutory provisions is excluded.
liabilityLinksParagraphs: Our website contains links to external websites operated by third parties.

We have no influence over the content of these websites and therefore accept no responsibility or liability for their content. Responsibility for linked websites always lies with their respective operators.
If we become aware of any legal infringement, the relevant links will be removed promptly.
copyrightParagraphs: All content, text, graphics, images, and other materials published on this website are protected by copyright.
Any reproduction, modification, distribution, or commercial use requires prior written permission unless otherwise permitted by law.
Where third-party content is used, the respective copyrights remain with their owners.
Should you become aware of any copyright infringement, please contact us so that the relevant material can be removed without delay.
applicableLawParagraphs: These terms are governed by the applicable laws relating to package travel and consumer protection, including Directive (EU) 2015/2302 and relevant provisions of the German Civil Code (BGB) where applicable.

toursPage.title: Find Your Perfect Cycling Adventure
toursPage.body: From coastal rides to mountain adventures, explore our carefully designed cycling holidays across Albania.

hero.body: Explore Albania's breathtaking mountains, scenic coastlines, and historic villages through expertly guided cycling tours designed for unforgettable adventures.

about.label: About Us
about.quote: “At Albanien Radreisen, we believe the best way to experience Albania is on two wheels. Our expertly guided cycling tours take you through breathtaking landscapes, historic towns, and authentic local communities, creating unforgettable adventures with comfort, safety, and local expertise”

tours.label: Featured Tours
tours.title: Find Your Perfect Cycling Adventure

whyChooseUs.label: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.title: Why Ride With TARKO?
whyChooseUs.lead: From expertly planned routes to local guides, we create authentic cycling experiences that let you discover Albania safely, comfortably, and at your own pace.

features.title: Expertly Planned Tours
features.description: Ride carefully designed routes that showcase Albania's most breathtaking landscapes and hidden gems.

features.title: Local Guides & Authentic Experiences

steps.title: Choose Your Tour
steps.description: Browse our collection of guided cycling tours and select the route that best matches your interests, fitness level, and travel dates.

steps.title: Complete Your Booking
steps.description: Reserve your spot by submitting your booking details. We'll take care of the planning, accommodation, and tour arrangements.

steps.title: Confirm Availability
steps.description: Get in touch with us to check tour availability. We'll answer your questions and help you choose the perfect departure date.

faq.label: FAQ's
faq.title: Answers You Need, Anytime You Ask

items.question: Do I need previous cycling experience?
items.answer: No. Our tours welcome riders of all levels, and our guides adapt the pace and support to match your experience.

items.question: Are bikes included in the tour package?
items.answer: Yes. High-quality touring bikes are included, along with helmets and basic repair support on the road.

items.question: What should I bring for the tour?
items.answer: Pack comfortable cycling clothing, sunscreen, a refillable water bottle, and any personal items you need for a multi-day ride.

items.question: Are the tours suitable for beginners?
items.answer: Yes. Our tours are designed for all experience levels, from beginners to experienced cyclists, with expert guidance throughout the journey.

items.question: Can I book a private cycling tour?
items.answer: Absolutely. We can arrange private departures for groups, families, or custom dates depending on availability.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Loved By Travelers Like You
testimonials.body: Hear directly from our travelers — their stories, in their own words, on video.

items.quote: The routes were breathtaking, the organization was excellent, and our guide made every day unforgettable. Albania completely exceeded our expectations.
items.name: Sarah Mitchell

items.quote: Every detail was taken care of. The scenery, the food, the people — riding through Albania felt like discovering a country most tourists never see.
items.name: James Carter

items.quote: Our guide's local knowledge turned every stop into a story. This was hands down the best cycling trip our group has ever taken.
items.name: Elena Rossi

items.quote: From the mountain descents to the coastal villages, everything was paced perfectly for our group. We're already planning our next trip back.
items.name: Marco Alves

aboutIntro.label: Featured Tours
aboutIntro.title: About Tarko Albanian
aboutIntro.paragraph1: Welcome to Albania Travel — your source for unforgettable experiences in Albania. We combine modern comfort with breathtaking landscapes and professional assistance to make your trip a special adventure.
aboutIntro.paragraph2: With years of experience, local knowledge and a dedicated team we create tailor-made tours to fit your needs. From cultural and historical tours to cycling trips and hiking — we handle every detail so you can focus on the journey.

team.label: Our People
team.title: Meet the Team
team.body: Our passionate team of cycling guides and travel professionals is dedicated to making every journey safe, enjoyable, and unforgettable.

footer.description: Creating unforgettable cycling adventures across Albania with expertly guided tours and authentic travel experiences.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Albanien Radreisen. Design and Developed bY Blue Hawke.

8-day-cycling.title: 8-Day Cycling & Discovery Tour Through Albania (2026)
8-day-cycling.quickDescription: Discover Albania, often called the "Last Secret of Europe," on an unforgettable guided cycling adventure. Ride through mountain passes, UNESCO World Heritage cities, breathtaking coastlines, and picturesque valleys while experiencing authentic Albanian culture and hospitality.
8-day-cycling.quickDescriptionAudience: Suitable for couples, families, friends, solo travelers, and small groups.
8-day-cycling.aboutBody: Experience an eight-day guided cycling journey across Albania covering approximately 350 km through mountains, valleys, lakes, and the stunning Ionian and Adriatic coastlines. The route combines scenic cycling, cultural exploration, UNESCO heritage sites, and comfortable hotel stays, making it ideal for travelers with a moderate level of fitness.

tourInfo.value: Mostly paved secondary roads with some gravel sections

highlights: Cycle around Lake Ohrid, Europe's deepest lake
Ride through the Vjosa Valley National Park
Visit three UNESCO World Heritage cities
Stay in beautiful coastal hotels on the Ionian and Adriatic Seas
Experience authentic Albanian culture and cuisine
importantNotes: Some cycling days exceed 1,000 m elevation gain.
Support vehicle available during selected uphill sections.
Mostly paved roads with limited gravel sections.

itinerary.title: Day 3 – Pogradec → Korça → Vjosa Valley → Përmet
Day 7 – Vlora → Zvernec Lagoon → Durrës → Tirana

included: Luggage transport vehicle with bicycle trailer

reviews.quote: The routes were breathtaking, the organization was excellent, and our guide made every day unforgettable. Albania completely exceeded our expectations.
reviews.name: Sarah Mitchell

reviews.quote: Every detail was taken care of. The scenery, the food, the people — riding through Albania felt like discovering a country most tourists never see.
reviews.name: James Carter

reviews.quote: Our guide's local knowledge turned every stop into a story. This was hands down the best cycling trip our group has ever taken.
reviews.name: Elena Rossi

8-day-albania-montenegro.title: 8-Day Albania – Montenegro Cycling Adventure Tour (2026)
8-day-albania-montenegro.quickDescription: Experience the breathtaking landscapes of Albania and Montenegro on an unforgettable cycling adventure through the Balkans. Ride across mountain passes, crystal-clear lakes, alpine valleys, and charming villages while enjoying local hospitality, scenic boat rides, and hiking in the spectacular Albanian Alps.
8-day-albania-montenegro.quickDescriptionAudience: Ideal for couples, families, solo travelers, and small groups looking for an active adventure.
8-day-albania-montenegro.aboutBody: This 8-day guided cycling and adventure tour combines cycling, hiking, and boating across Albania and Montenegro. Explore the Albanian Alps, Lake Skadar, the Valbona Valley, and remote Balkan villages while covering scenic routes through mountains, rivers, and lakes. The tour is designed for travelers with a moderate fitness level and is supported by a luggage transfer vehicle throughout the journey.

tourInfo.value: Mostly paved secondary roads with some gravel sections

highlights: Visit Lake Skadar, the largest lake in the Balkans
Boat trip across the Koman Reservoir
Hike through the beautiful Valbona Valley
Ride through mountain villages and alpine passes
Discover authentic local culture and hospitality
importantNotes: Program schedule is subject to change.
Some stages exceed 1,000 meters of elevation gain.
Support vehicle accompanies the group throughout the tour.
Cycling takes place primarily on paved secondary roads with occasional gravel sections.
Increased traffic may be encountered near cities.

itinerary.title: Day 5 – Shkodra → Koman Reservoir → Valbona Valley
itinerary.distance: 100 km transfer · ~2 h boat · 60 km cycling

reviews.quote: The mix of cycling, hiking, and the Koman boat trip made this the most memorable adventure we have ever taken in the Balkans.
reviews.name: Anna Keller

reviews.quote: Lake Skadar, the Albanian Alps, and Valbona were breathtaking. Organization and support were excellent throughout.
reviews.name: Thomas Weber

reviews.quote: Crossing into Montenegro and exploring remote mountain villages felt like discovering a different world. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: Laura Bianchi
